title: Arizona Divorce and Legal Separation Checklist
summary: A practical starting checklist for court forms, financial disclosure, parenting issues, and service deadlines.
items: Gather income, debt, and asset records

title: Parenting Time Preparation Guide
summary: Prepare parenting-time facts, school and medical information, safety concerns, and proposed schedules.

title: Child Support Information Checklist
summary: What to collect before reviewing Arizona child support, including income, insurance, childcare, and parenting time.

title: Enforcement and Existing Orders Review
summary: A structured way to review current orders, missed obligations, upcoming deadlines, and available documentation.

title: Not Sure Where to Start
summary: A general triage pathway for people who are unsure whether their issue is divorce, parenting, support, enforcement, documents, or another family-law topic.
items: Identify whether a case already exists
List any deadlines or court dates
Use guided intake for scope review
